content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — Description claims "AI-powered suggestions," "built-in ad blocker," and "offline" support, but ContentView.swift (App/ContentView.swift:1-20) only implements a plain in-memory `List`/`TextField` task adder with no ML/CoreML imports, no ad-blocking/content-blocker extension, and no offline persistence (no CoreData/CloudKit/local storage code).
Pierre: Apple's App Review will test the described features directly, and unsupported claims like "AI-powered" or "ad blocker" risk rejection under 2.3 (accurate metadata) or even 2.3.1 (misleading marketing). Since the codebase shows only a basic local task list with no AI, ad-blocking, or offline-storage implementation, either implement these features or rewrite the description to match actual functionality before submission.
